description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved quizartinib in combination with standard daunorubicin and cytarabine induction therapy for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with newly diagnosed acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) who are FLT3-ITD mutation positive.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
